caption_text:
I know so many of you don’t believe me … in fact I know so many of you love to joke about my pov on this … but the second you realize it’s TRUE is the second your world and life start to actually move in the right direction. Whether you believe me today or you end up realizing how right I was in 50 years … it won’t matter until you start acting on the truth of it 🩷🩷🩷🩷🩷 I love you all - if you’re ready to finally attack your life without fear DM me now “age aint shit”

PS : Go to the follow or following button in my profile and hit the ⭐️ to add to favorites

#age #advice #inspiration #garyvee

caption_text:
I’m sooooooooo tired of the clouds ☁️ and the rain 🌧️ … my friends …. 99% of you who see this are wonderful and great people .. please start loving yourself ❤️ start appreciating yourself ❤️ start understanding that for many Reasons too many of you put yourselves down and beat yourselves up … STOP 🛑 THAT SHIT … I am telling you, you’re great… now believe it yourself - stop comparing, stop worrying about outside noise and judgment - start slowing down and focusing on what actually matters ❤️❤️❤️❤️🔑 SHARE THIS WITH SOMEONE YOU LOVE 💕

PS: Hit the follow or following button in my profile and hit the ⭐️ to add to favorites

#loveyourself #mindset #garyvee

caption_text:
The era of “good people in business” never left .. it’s just not been focused on enough! The trickle down of. Being a nice person who creates professional success is substantial and impactful and matters a lot because .. everyone around you and effected is effected. Good and Bad both create more versions of good and bad and there are so many kind and wonderful moguls in the world 🌎- don’t let the bad stories confuse you .. this issue is that negativity is louder than positivity these days and really honestly always but that doesn’t stop me from pushing this truth in this narrative ❤️❤️❤️

#nice #kindness #professional #garyvee

Why do sooooooo many look for “easy” .. my friends … pls .. understand that the easy stuff is so often not what you’re looking for - all great stuff is hard

#garyvee #resilience #workhard

This Sunday ☀️ morning gospel around failure may change someone’s life - pls pls pls send this video to as many people in your life that could use some clarity and perspective on failure. We all have micro failures at scale .. it’s time to understand them 

#garyvee #perspective #mindset

I want all the people who DM and email me daily to know … I didn’t do shit 💩… you did it .. millions cost me the content .. thousands do something about it .. I appreciate the flowers 🌺 but I promise it’s .. YOU !!!

Who’s ready to finally become 
Accountable 
Action oriented 
Tenacious 
Resilient 
And self aware enough to know what they should do and get into ????

#garyvee #accountability #selfawareness

caption_text:
I hope this video “hits” for a few of you this morning … being embarrassed isn’t it .. especially when it’s “good” … we need some perspective shifts in our society - I’m proud of this young man … and many of you ❤️❤️❤️❤️‼️

#garyvee #relationships #perspective
So much pondering. So much debating. So much fear. So much insecurity. So many what-ifs. So much looking backwards. So much doubt….. stop it - live ! ❤️❤️❤️ #motivation #mindset #positivity #garyvee

A little morning wisdom to the youth … I realllllly hope this helps someone this morning ☀️ 

Parents send this to your kids - especially the ones graduating or under 25

#youth #advice #motivation

caption_text:
The rise of analog is one of the most fascinating business emerging trends in the world 🌎 and I’m here for it .. you ?

#analog #business #trends

I need you to listen this morning … like really listen 👂 … please share this with someone’s who’s scared to share … please 🙏

#garyvee #mindset #perspective
